narrative:
Springfield Twp I (precinct in Summit County) has 1,015 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
